code:
in.cvText = "John Doe
Email: john.doe@example.com

Summary:
Experienced Java developer with 7 years of experience in enterprise software development.

Skills:
Java, Spring Boot, Microservices, REST APIs, SQL, Docker, Kubernetes, CI/CD

Experience:

- Java Developer at SoftSolutions (2018-2020)
  Developed backend APIs for insurance management systems.

Education:
Bachelor of Computer Science, State University, 2017";

in.jobDescription = "We are looking for a Senior Java Developer to join our growing engineering team.

Requirements:
- 5+ years of Java development experience
- Strong knowledge of Spring Boot and REST API design
- Experience with microservices architecture
- Familiarity with Docker and Kubernetes
- Good understanding of SQL databases

Responsibilities:
- Design and implement backend services
- Collaborate with frontend teams on API contracts
- Participate in code reviews and mentoring junior developers

Nice to have:
- Experience with cloud platforms (AWS, Azure)
- Knowledge of event-driven architecture (Kafka)";
